# Glossary

Domain-specific terms used in this codebase. Loaded into bundles for terms appearing in task bodies.

Each term is an H2 heading; definition is 1-2 sentences underneath.

     parts of the code, the glossary disambiguates. -->

     during onboarding (Phase A4 of docs/21-onboarding.md).

     Add terms as you encounter ambiguity. Common categories:
     - Concepts unique to this codebase ("widget", "vendor", "node")
     - Terms with non-obvious meaning ("active user" — monthly?

     - Anything that's caused confusion before
     - Acronyms specific to your domain

     body, so glossary growth doesn't bloat bundles. -->
